title: Light Suppression Wand
description: Get full control over light-emissive blocks.
body:
# Light Suppression Wand
Shift+Right-Click with a golden hoe to suppress light from *any* light-emitting block (torches, glowstone, portals, etc.).

![demo](https://i.imgur.com/XuDQ7Nx.gif)

## Info
- **Works on EVERY light source**—no exceptions!
- **Persists across server restarts**.
- **Auto-cleans up** on block break, explosions, pistons, or updates.
- **MiniHUD compatible**—light overlays update *instantly* via server-client packets.
- **Server & client support**—multiplayer friendly.
- Compatible with [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)

## Quick Start
1. Grab a **golden hoe**.
2. **Shift + Right-Click** any lit block to suppress.
3. **Shift + Right-Click** again to restore.

I highly recommend pairing it with [Light Overlay](https://modrinth.com/mod/light-overlay) or [MiniHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud) to see it update in real time.
